title: Métropolis.
description: Miscellaneous stuff of modern railway parts for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Métropolis.
_The opening of London's steam-hauled Metropolitan Railway in 1863 marked the beginning of rapid transit._
## Overview
**Métropolis** is an addon which added Miscellaneous stuff of modern railway parts for [Minecraft Trainsit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway).

This mod includes **Urban railway transit** elements around the world.

Not only will there be station decorative blocks, but it will also include train and platform objects in the future.

We have also created a **ticket-system** based on MTR mod, you can buy a **single trip** and an **IC card** now!

## Features
- Tickets, IC Cards
- Turnstiles
- Ticket Vendor Machines
- Platforms
- Rotatable Bumper/Buffer
- Rotatable (decorative) Monitor
- Security Camera
- Platform Blocks
- And more!

## Languages supported
The following languages are included (or will be included) in the Mod.
- English (United States) /en_us: 100%
- Chinese (Simplified) /zh_cn: 100%
- Chinese (Traditional Taiwan) /zh_tw: 90%
- Chinese (Traditional Hong Kong) /zh_hk: 90%
- Japanese /jp_jp: 0%

**We'll also be happy if you want to help us translate the mod by creating pull request on Github.**

## Supported versions
**This Mod supports Fabric 1.19.2/1.18.2/1.20.1 and Minecraft Transit Railway 3.2.2.**
**There is also a MTR 4.0.3 port for Minercaft 1.20.1**

This mod only supports MTR 3.2.2. However, Métropolis for MTR 4 is under develop, which will be compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1.
